summary: PR 2614 links melee/if/if_2FC93.c by changing configure.py from NonMatching to Matching and tightening GALE01 split and symbol metadata around if_2FC93.c and adjacent ifprize.c sections. The evidence is entirely diff-based; there is no PR body, review discussion, or explicit build/objdiff output in the slice.

key_files.role: Marks melee/if/if_2FC93.c as Matching instead of NonMatching in the MatchingFor object list.
Narrows if_2FC93.c rodata, bss, and sdata2 ranges and assigns the following rodata, bss, and sdata2 ranges to adjacent ifprize.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:splits.txt hunk around melee/if/if_2FC93.c and melee/if/ifprize.c

key_files.role: Updates symbol scope/names and sizes for rodata, data strings, bss, sdata strings, sbss, and sdata2 floats/doubles near the if_2FC93.c and ifprize.c boundary.

what_changed: splits.txt adds corresponding ifprize.c ranges for .rodata 0x803B8790-0x803B8810, .bss 0x804A1F48-0x804A1F58, and .sdata2 0x804DDBD0-0x804DDCC8.

symbols.txt converts several address-style globals in the if_2FC93-owned ranges to local numeric labels, including rodata @208, data strings @377 and @393, sdata strings @373 and @374, and sdata2 labels @375, @376, @378, @379, @380, @381, and @383.
symbols.txt shrinks un_804A1F10 from size 0x38 to 0x34 and un_804D6D90 from size 0x8 to 0x4, and adds a local bss label at 0x804A1F10.

smart_moves.text: The PR links the object only after updating split ownership and symbol metadata around adjacent if_2FC93.c/ifprize.c sections, rather than only flipping configure.py.
Local labels are used for literals and constants within the adjusted ranges instead of keeping all unknown address-style symbols global.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a link/matching-status PR, nearby split boundaries and symbol metadata may need to be corrected together with the configure.py Matching flip, especially when section tails actually belong to the next translation unit.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:splits.txt reassigns rodata/bss/sdata2 tails from if_2FC93.c to ifprize.c

naming_conventions.convention: When metadata indicates local compiler literals/constants, this PR uses local numeric labels such as @208, @377, @393, and @375-@383 instead of global un_ADDRESS names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:symbols.txt replacements of un_803B8780, un_803F99C8, un_803F99F0, un_804D5820, un_804D5828, and un_804DDBAC-0x804DDBC8

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust split section ownership at the if_2FC93.c/ifprize.c boundary before marking if_2FC93.c as Matching.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The slice does not include the underlying source function body or objdiff output, so the exact matching failure fixed by these metadata changes is not shown.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Correct symbol sizes/scopes in symbols.txt for boundary data, including bss and sbss size reductions and local labels for literals.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Supported as an observed tactic in this PR; not enough evidence to generalize individual addresses beyond this PR without curator/source review.

follow_up_queries: if_2FC93 split boundary ifprize rodata bss sdata2

notes: Strong evidence for files changed, exact metadata edits, and merged PR identity.
No PR body, issue comments, review comments, reviews, source-code diff, build log, objdiff, or regression output is present in the slice.
The title and configure.py change support that if_2FC93.c was linked/marked Matching, but the slice does not prove the exact verification method or reviewer rationale.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Linking an object can require adjacent split and symbol metadata cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2614, melee/if/if_2FC93.c was changed from NonMatching to Matching while splits.txt narrowed if_2FC93.c section ownership and assigned trailing .rodata, .bss, and .sdata2 ranges to adjacent ifprize.c; symbols.txt also changed several boundary symbols from global un_ADDRESS names to local labels or corrected sizes.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2614 adjusted if_2FC93.c and ifprize.c split boundaries
source_update_candidates.text: For GALE01 after PR 2614, melee/if/if_2FC93.c has .text 0x802FD910-0x802FE3F8, .rodata 0x803B8780-0x803B8790, .data 0x803F99C8-0x803F9A00, .bss 0x804A1F10-0x804A1F48, .sdata 0x804D5820-0x804D5830, .sbss 0x804D6D90-0x804D6D98, and .sdata2 0x804DDBA8-0x804DDBD0; adjacent ifprize.c gains .rodata 0x803B8790-0x803B8810, .bss 0x804A1F48-0x804A1F58, and .sdata2 0x804DDBD0-0x804DDCC8.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete split-boundary fact from the PR diff, but should be reviewed against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2614 changed selected if_2FC93 boundary symbols to local labels
source_update_candidates.text: symbols.txt changes include un_803B8780 to @208, un_803F99C8 to @377, un_803F99F0 to @393, un_804D5820 to @373, un_804D5828 to @374, and un_804DDBAC/DBB0/DBB4/DBB8/DBBC/DBC0/DBC8 to @375/@376/@378/@379/@380/@381/@383 respectively.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for symbol-history lookup; should remain a candidate because current symbols may have changed after this historical PR.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all un_ADDRESS literals near a matching TU should be converted to local numeric labels; this PR only proves specific symbol edits.
Do not claim objdiff/checkdiff/build verification from this slice; no verifier output is included.
Do not infer reviewer intent or review standards; no review comments or reviews are present.
